ddls:
CREATE TABLE "properties" (
  "property_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for the property */,
  "property_name" TEXT /* Name of the property or project */,
  "price" TEXT /* Price of the property */,
  "bhk" INTEGER /* Number of bedrooms (BHK) */,
  "transaction_type" TEXT /* Type of transaction (e.g., New Property, Resale) */,
  "floor" TEXT /* Floor number of the property */,
  "facing_direction" TEXT /* Direction the property faces */,
  "furnishing" TEXT /* Furnishing status (e.g., Unfurnished, Semi-Furnished) */,
  "ownership" TEXT /* Ownership status */,
  "society_name" TEXT /* Name of the society or complex */,
  "bathrooms" INTEGER /* Number of bathrooms */,
  "car_parking" INTEGER /* Number of car parking spaces */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the property (e.g., Ready to Move, Under Construction) */,
  "agent_id" INTEGER /* ID of the agent managing the property */,
  "owner_name" TEXT /* Name of the property owner */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the property */,
  "product_link" TEXT /* Link to the product page */,
  "area_in_sqr_feet" INTEGER /* Area of the property in square feet */,
  "price_per_sqr_feet" TEXT /* Price per square foot */,
  "reviews" TEXT /* Detailed reviews and ratings for the property */,
  "added_date" TEXT /* Date the property was added */,
  "updated_date" TEXT /* Date the property was last updated */,
  "visibility_status" TEXT /* Visibility status (e.g., Active, Inactive) */,
  "property_type" TEXT /* Type of property (e.g., Apartment, Villa, Plot) */,
  "property_age" INTEGER /* Age of the property in years */,
  "registration_status" TEXT /* Registration status (e.g., Registered, Unregistered) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("property_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_properties_agent_id FOREIGN KEY ("agent_id") REFERENCES agents ("agent_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "agents" (
  "agent_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each agent */,
  "agent_name" TEXT /* Name of the agent */,
  "company_name" TEXT /* Name of the agent's company */,
  "contact_number" TEXT /* Contact number of the agent */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the agent */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the agent's office */,
  "agent_type" TEXT /* Type of agent (e.g., Individual, Company) */,
  "commission_rate" REAL /* Commission rate for the agent */,
  "registration_date" TEXT /* Date the agent registered */,
  "license_number" TEXT /* License number for the agent */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("agent_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "buyers" (
  "buyer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each buyer */,
  "buyer_name" TEXT /* Name of the buyer */,
  "contact_number" TEXT /* Contact number of the buyer */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the buyer */,
  "interested_properties" TEXT /* Comma-separated list of property IDs the buyer is interested in */,
  "buyer_from_agents" INTEGER /* Number of buyers referred by the agent */,
  "budget" INTEGER /* Budget of the buyer */,
  "preferred_location" TEXT /* Preferred location of the buyer */,
  "preferred_property_type" TEXT /* Preferred type of property for the buyer */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("buyer_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_buyers_buyer_from_agents FOREIGN KEY ("buyer_from_agents") REFERENCES agents ("agent_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reviews" (
  "review_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each review */,
  "property_id" TEXT /* ID of the property being reviewed */,
  "buyer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the buyer who left the review */,
  "review_date" TEXT /* Date the review was left */,
  "rating" REAL /* Rating given by the buyer (e.g., 1-5 stars) */,
  "review_text" TEXT /* Text of the review */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("review_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "viewings" (
  "viewing_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each viewing */,
  "property_id" TEXT /* ID of the property being viewed */,
  "buyer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the buyer who scheduled the viewing */,
  "viewing_date" TEXT /* Date of the viewing */,
  "viewing_time" TEXT /* Time of the viewing */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the viewing (e.g., Scheduled, Completed, Cancelled) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("viewing_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "offers" (
  "offer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each offer */,
  "property_id" TEXT /* ID of the property being offered on */,
  "buyer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the buyer who made the offer */,
  "offer_date" TEXT /* Date the offer was made */,
  "offer_price" INTEGER /* Price of the offer */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the offer (e.g., Pending, Accepted, Rejected) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("offer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "payments" (
  "payment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each payment */,
  "property_id" TEXT /* ID of the property being paid for */,
  "buyer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the buyer who made the payment */,
  "payment_date" TEXT /* Date the payment was made */,
  "payment_amount" INTEGER /* Amount of the payment */,
  "payment_method" TEXT /* Method of payment (e.g., Cash, Credit Card) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("payment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username chosen by the user */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., Admin, Agent, Buyer) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)
column_names: Name of the property or project
Type of transaction (e.g., New Property, Resale)
